challenges.title: How do you run a .py file?
challenges.description: I wonder what the answer is. I have a .py file and I want to run it. How do I do that?
challenges.help: Try installing python and running the file from the command line using 'python filename.py'.

challenges.title: Blind SQL Injection Challenge
challenges.description: This challenge requires you to extract data from the database without seeing the output directly.
challenges.help: Use time-based or boolean-based techniques to infer information from the database.

challenges.title: Reflected XSS Challenge
challenges.description: Find a way to inject malicious scripts into the web application.
challenges.help: Look for input fields that reflect user input without proper sanitization.

challenges.title: Stored XSS Challenge
challenges.description: This challenge involves injecting scripts that are stored and executed when other users view the content.
challenges.help: Try to find a way to store your script in the application, such as through comments or user profiles.
